---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's missing or awkward today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it's a new tool, sketch the inputs/outputs.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds or other approaches you've thought about.

## Scope note

This server wraps Heap's **server-side (write) API** — event ingestion, user/account property enrichment, identity resolution, and user deletion. Heap has **no public query/reporting API** (data-out is via Heap Connect to a warehouse), so read/reporting tools aren't feasible here. If your request is about reading analytics, please mention how you'd expect it to work given that constraint.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, references to Heap docs, etc.
